subject: [AAI|ROBOT] track latest commits on submodules
commit_message:
[AAI|ROBOT] track latest commits on submodules

Since we were not tracking branch but tags, modifying gitmodules is not
sufficient, we also have to retrieve latest patches done before.

Issue-ID: OOM-2364
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: Icf20bcc29e65a09e3515616cdeabf2f4064fc856
